nice_to_have: If the description links the article with an affiliate link, switch monetization to 'affiliate' and add an FTC disclosure (the publish gate enforces it).

metadata.title: How to Pick a Genuinely Free AI Writing Tool (for Novelists)
metadata.description: A 75-second guide for novelists: how to tell a real free AI writing tool from a trial in disguise — free tier vs trial, who owns your words, and the monthly word caps.
